calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (886 Dartmouth Street, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Aug-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Paolini for and with Debra Dolch (Trustee).

The sale was confirmed at $683,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 15, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chin. (Not Reported)
